subject: 2 Days Left! Save 50% on a Digital Subscription at our Presidents' Day Sale
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTAd2tB81HXJB84OezAAwENceg/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

PRESIDENTS' DAY SALE

TWO DAYS LEFT TO SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS
ON A DIGITAL SUBSCRIPTION

-- ENDS FEB 18 --

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTAd2tB81HXJB84OezAAwENceg/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Presidents' Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage 
of big subscription savings. 

Save 50% for a full 26 weeks of a digital subscription and stay 
fully informed about politics, business, the arts, dining and 
so much more -- with in-depth articles and innovative multimedia 
that enrich the reading experience. 

Choose from digital subscription options that include full access 
to the redesigned NYTimes.com and our exceptional smartphone 
or tablet apps or both. 

There's no better way to stay on top of all the news, covered 
by more than 1,000 of the world's finest journalists.

HURRY! SALE ENDS TOMORROW!*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTAd2tB81HXJB84OezAAwENceg/sub2

*****
Unlimited access to:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTAd2tB81HXJB84OezAAwENceg/sub3

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*This sale expires on February 19, 2014, 9 a.m. E.T. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscribers only. New York Times 
digital subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader editions, 
Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords apps. Mobile apps 
are not supported on all devices. Digital subscriptions will 
automatically renew and the credit card will be charged in advance of 
each 4-week billing period unless canceled. If the subscription is 
canceled, refunds and termination of access will follow the 
Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTAd2tB81HXJB84OezAAwENceg/nyt
